description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN they receive a notification THEN the notification should be delivered successfully without requiring manual re-enabling of permissions.

description: Improve notification delivery latency from the 95th percentile of 340ms to under 200ms by optimizing the delivery pipeline.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN measured THEN the delivery latency should be under 200ms for 95% of notifications.

description: Implement a three-tier priority system for notifications (urgent, normal, low) to help users distinguish between critical alerts and routine updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN they are sent THEN the notifications should display with the correct priority level and visual indicators.

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Create a settings page that allows users to opt in/out of specific notification categories (marketing, product updates, social, transactional).
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification preferences page WHEN they select categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected in future notifications.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery metrics to ensure compliance with performance goals.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN monitoring is set up WHEN delivery metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger if performance goals are not met.

story_title: Gather User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Implement a feedback mechanism to collect user insights on notification preferences and delivery timing.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit their preferences THEN their feedback should be recorded and analyzed for future improvements.

story_title: Address Accessibility Concerns in Notification Center
description: Improve the navigation of the notification center for users with accessibility needs, particularly for screen reader users and colorblind users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with accessibility needs accesses the notification center WHEN they navigate THEN they should be able to do so without barriers and receive all notifications.

description: Develop comprehensive documentation for all new notification features, including user guides and API references.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN new features are implemented WHEN documentation is created THEN it should be clear, comprehensive, and accessible to all users.

description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into a digest delivered at optimal times based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has multiple low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN they should be batched and delivered at the optimal time.

story_title: Conduct Experiment on Notification Content Optimization
description: Run experiments to test different notification content strategies to improve click-through rates and reduce unsubscribe rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification content strategies are tested WHEN users interact with notifications THEN the click-through rates and unsubscribe rates should be measured and analyzed.
